severityPolicy.hard: Blocks release for legal, compliance, security, build, routing, source, or publication-integrity risk.
severityPolicy.strong_soft: Does not block artifact handoff, but must be reported because it materially affects production readiness.

completionBoundary: Hard validators must pass. Strong-soft and warning findings must be emitted in reports without blocking artifact handoff unless reclassified through this matrix. Do not add petty blockers.
